narrative: Mid-rise commercial steel erection. Daily JHA documented, toolbox talks performed daily. Fall protection: certified harnesses on all workers above 6 ft, anchored to engineered tie-offs. Scaffolding inspected pre-shift by competent person (R. Chen, CCST). Excavation 4 ft (below threshold). PPE: hard hats + glasses + hi-vis + gloves required and observed. Crane lift: signal person + spotter assigned. Silica wet-cut method per Table 1. Confined space (utility vault): permit + attendant + atmospheric test current. No near-misses last 30 days.
